title: The Knock Up Stream Launches — Part 5
description: The Straw Hats ride the violent Knock Up Stream and commit fully to the impossible path toward Sky Island.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 20, 21, this scene centers on Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Blackbeard, Sanji. The Straw Hats ride the violent Knock Up Stream and commit fully to the impossible path toward Sky Island.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Let's break through the Emperor- ornimbus!

summary: The Straw Hats ride the violent Knock Up Stream and commit fully to the impossible path toward Sky Island.
